'''''Blazing Rockets''''' was the autobiography of poet, scholar, and [[Wikipedia:philology|philologist]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]]. In it, Baobab described the many adventures of his lifetime, all "with breathtaking lyricism and unflagging power," according to his ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]''.<ref name="Travel Book" />
